name: Irvington Commons
description: Come play pickleball at Irvington Commons in Irvington, VA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Tides Inn
description: Tides Inn is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Irvington, VA. There are 4 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
